content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.5-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the branch against 26edf3340c5c84297ede274973eeba3b7085ad30, ignoring .ralph-burning runtime state. Found one durability issue; nix build completed successfully.

## Amendments

1. src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs:1313-1318 and 1339-1344 can mark a covered_by_existing_bead comment as reconciled even after a prior sync failure. If the first attempt posts the comment locally and `sync_flush` fails, the failure-path retry from src/contexts/automation_runtime/daemon_loop.rs:2569-2578 sees the local `amendment_id` marker, skips posting, skips sync because `comments_posted == 0`, and returns Ok while the required comment may still be unflushed. Flush own pending mutations even when the marker already exists, preferably with the guarded own-dirty sync path.
   Classification: fix_current_bead
   Rationale: This violates the idempotency/durability requirement for covered_by_existing_bead reconciliation comments after transient br sync failures.
